description: Read unread mail for sessions selected by selector. Reads mark messages read unless peek is true.

all_namespaces.description: Bypass namespace scoping and read across all namespaces.

namespace.description: Namespace slug to scope this read. Overrides the caller session namespace fallback.

peek.description: Return unread mail without marking it read.

selector.description: Inbox owner selector used for matching sessions.

name: mail_read
